subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1915-10-26 in Bahji
subcodes.first_line: The purpose of kindling the lamp is not for the shrine itself, but rather for such souls as enter therein, that through this means they may be moved to remembrance; for in truth the shrine itself is sanctified [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: مقصد از سوزاندن چراغ نه برای روضه است، بل برای نفوسی که وارد می شوند است که به آن واسطه ذکر کنند والا خود روضه مقدس است
subcodes.subjects: @Islamic laws and jurisprudence, @Shrines and Holy places
